ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot */,
  "robot_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the robot */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the robot */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date when the robot was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the robot (e.g., active, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the robot (e.g., lab, storage) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name or ID of the institution or individual who owns the robot */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the robot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion profile */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot associated with the motion profile */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the motion profile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the motion profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the motion profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the motion profile was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the motion profile */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the motion profile (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_profiles_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot used in the experiment */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion profile used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES motion_profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_capture_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion capture data entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the motion capture data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the motion capture data */,
  "motion_data" TEXT /* Raw motion capture data */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number of the motion capture data */,
  "frame_rate" REAL /* Frame rate at which the data was captured */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that captured the data */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., camera, IMU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_capture_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion analysis entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the motion analysis */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric analyzed */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., gait analysis, performance metrics) */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method or algorithm used for the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "joint_data" (
  "joint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each joint */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot associated with the joint */,
  "joint_name" TEXT /* Name of the joint */,
  "joint_type" TEXT /* Type of the joint (e.g., revolute, prismatic) */,
  "range_of_motion" TEXT /* Range of motion for the joint */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., calibrated, needs calibration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("joint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_joint_data_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "joint_motion_data" (
  "joint_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each joint motion data entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the joint motion data */,
  "joint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the joint associated with the joint motion data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the joint motion data */,
  "motion_data" TEXT /* Motion data from the joint */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number of the joint motion data */,
  "frame_rate" REAL /* Frame rate at which the data was captured */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that captured the data */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., camera, IMU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("joint_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_joint_motion_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_joint_motion_data_joint_id FOREIGN KEY ("joint_id") REFERENCES joint_data ("joint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "limb_data" (
  "limb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each limb */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot associated with the limb */,
  "limb_name" TEXT /* Name of the limb */,
  "limb_type" TEXT /* Type of the limb (e.g., leg, arm) */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the limb */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., calibrated, needs calibration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_limb_data_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "limb_motion_data" (
  "limb_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each limb motion data entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the limb motion data */,
  "limb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the limb associated with the limb motion data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the limb motion data */,
  "motion_data" TEXT /* Motion data from the limb */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number of the limb motion data */,
  "frame_rate" REAL /* Frame rate at which the data was captured */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that captured the data */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., camera, IMU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limb_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_limb_motion_data_limb_id FOREIGN KEY ("limb_id") REFERENCES limb_data ("limb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_limb_motion_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the access log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access log */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_joint_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot associated with the calibration */,
  "joint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the joint associated with the calibration */,
  "calibration_data" TEXT /* Calibration data for the joint */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_joint_calibration_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_joint_calibration_joint_id FOREIGN KEY ("joint_id") REFERENCES joint_data ("joint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_limb_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot associated with the calibration */,
  "limb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the limb associated with the calibration */,
  "calibration_data" TEXT /* Calibration data for the limb */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_limb_calibration_limb_id FOREIGN KEY ("limb_id") REFERENCES limb_data ("limb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_limb_calibration_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_motion_profile_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot associated with the calibration */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion profile associated with the calibration */,
  "calibration_data" TEXT /* Calibration data for the motion profile */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_motion_profile_calibration_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_motion_profile_calibration_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES motion_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_experiment_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot associated with the calibration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the calibration */,
  "calibration_data" TEXT /* Calibration data for the experiment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_experiment_calibration_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_experiment_calibration_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_platform" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform entry */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot associated with the platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform entry was last updated */,
  "platform_version" TEXT /* Version of the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the platform (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_platform_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)
